summary: 2026-07-10 22:52 PDT — The functional implementation matches the approved design, but the branch violates the spec’s explicit scope-containment criterion. The required test/build gate could not be independently verified because the read-only sandbox prevented Vitest from creating its temporary Vite config.

findings.title: Branch includes a file outside the scope allowlist
findings.claim: AC5 explicitly permits only the listed implementation/test/runbook files plus the story file and its `.design.json`. `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` also includes this `.approach.json`, so the branch does not satisfy the stated acceptance criterion.
findings.suggestion: Remove `reviews/panel-teardown-breadcrumb.approach.json` from this feature branch, or obtain and record Thomas’s explicit amendment to AC5 allowing this artifact.
